alkylation reagent: alkylated with 20 mM iodoacetamide (IAA) at room temperature for 60 min in the dark
cleavage agent: digested with TPCK treated trypsin (T1426; Sigma) at 37°C for 18 h
enrichment method: the α2,6‐sialylated proteins were pulled down with SNA lectin
fragmentation method: Mass spectra were acquired with a MALDI TOF/TOF mass spectrometer
instrument: Mass spectra were acquired with a MALDI TOF/TOF mass spectrometer
labeling: the N‐glycan profiles of pig endometrium on gestational days 12, 15 and 18 were characterized by MALDI‐TOF MS
reduction reagent: reduced with 10 mM DL‐Dithiothreitol (DTT) at 60°C for 30 min
